product_description: Backend service for Rupantar AI, handling authentication, creator applications, and user data management.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User registration, login, and social authentication.
user_stories: As a user, I want to log in with email and password.
As a user, I want to log in with social accounts.

features.name: Creator Management
user_stories: As a user, I want to apply to become a creator.
As an admin, I want to view and approve/reject creator applications.
